creator: bsd@bontempi.net
text:
Port net/syncthing-inotify is out of date.

Could it be please updated to latest version, 0.8.7?

https://github.com/syncthing/syncthing-inotify/releases


Would this be also a good opportunity to merge this: 
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=203951

Thank you.

Priyadarshan
